name: Solar Crest
description: A talisman forged to honor the daytime sky.

abilities.name: Shine
abilities.description: Grants the target ally a physical damage barrier for a while. Cooldown: 16. Mana Cost: 100. Cast Range: 1000. Duration: 7. Armor Bonus: 5. Move Speed Bonus: 15%. If not cast on self, also increases the target's armor, movement speed, and attack speed for the duration.
